title: Lepro Head Torch Rechargeable, 2000L Waterproof LED Headlamp with Red Warning Lights, 6 Lighting Modes, Long Runtime, Lightweight Headlight for Kids & Adults for Running Fishing Camping
features: USB Rechargeable: This head torch is charged via the provided USB cable. No need to buy batteries any more.
Super Bright: The lighting distance of this led head torch is up to 150m, which can meet any scene of outdoor activities at night.
6 Lighting Modes: 4 white light modes (Dimmable floodlight and spotlight). 2 red light modes (full brightness, flashing). White lights and red lights are controlled by different switches.

Lightweight & Adjustable: Weighing only 68g and with its easily adjustable, elastic headband, the headlamp is perfect for outdoor running, cycling, fishing, camping etc. Its waterproof rate is IPX4, means the rechargeable head torch is free from splashing water.
Adjustable Angle: Can be rotated at 45 degree up and down, this headlamp's beam angle is adjustable for oriented lighting.
description: Product Description Enjoy Excellent Lighting Experience Lepro head torch with white light and red light button is rechargeable, and it is lightweight that even won't make you feel its weight. Useful Head Torch A reliable hands-free torch for night-time running, walking dog in winter, night fishing, camping trip, reading anywhere, caving, hiking, emergency (power cut or vehicle breakdown), working in garage or workshop. Ideal gift for adults and kids. Pack of Two Keep one in your tool shed and one in your backpack, or bring a backup on your next hike to lend to a friend. Specifications Casing Material: ABS+PC Waterproof: IPX4 Wattage: 5W Voltage: 3.7V Working time: 4-15H Weight: 75g Beam distance: 150m Brightness: 2000lux / 300lm IPX4 Weatherproof With IPX4 waterproof rating, these durable headlamps can be used even in stormy weather, making it suitable for any-weather outdoor use. Super Bright The head light lighting distance is as high as 150m. It can be used continuously for 4-15H after being fully charged. It is specially designed for outdoor sports and camping enthusiasts.
